_meta.description: All 18 careers for the Draw Steel character builder. Each career provides skills, and optionally languages, renown, wealth, project points, and a perk.

careerBenefitsInfo.languages: Some careers allow learning extra languages from Languages in Orden.
careerBenefitsInfo.renown: Some careers increase starting Renown score (base 0).
careerBenefitsInfo.wealth: Some careers increase starting Wealth score (base 1).
careerBenefitsInfo.projectPoints: Some careers grant project points for use in crafting and research.
careerBenefitsInfo.perk: Each career grants access to one perk from a specific perk group.

agent.name: Agent
agent.description: You worked as a spy for a government or organization.

aristocrat.name: Aristocrat
aristocrat.description: You were born into money, married into it, or conned your way into it. You didn't need to work thanks to generational wealth.

artisan.name: Artisan
artisan.description: You made and sold useful wares.

beggar.name: Beggar
beggar.description: You lived by going to a tavern, crossroads, city street, or other busy area and begging passersby for money or food.

criminal.name: Criminal
criminal.description: You once worked as a bandit, insurgent, smuggler, outlaw, or even as an assassin.

disciple.name: Disciple
disciple.description: You worked in a church, temple, or other religious institution as part of the clergy.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description: You ventured into uncharted areas and made your living as a cartographer, researcher, resource seeker, or treasure hunter.

farmer.name: Farmer
farmer.description: You grew crops or cared for livestock.

gladiator.name: Gladiator
gladiator.description: You entertained the masses with flashy displays of violence in the arena.

laborer.name: Laborer
laborer.description: You worked as a farmer, builder, clothes washer, forester, miner, or some other profession engaged in hard manual labor.

skills.grantedFromNote: Two skills from either the crafting group or the exploration group

magesApprentice.name: Mage's Apprentice
magesApprentice.description: For long years, you studied magic under the mentorship of a more experienced mage.

performer.name: Performer
performer.description: You can sing, act, or dance well enough that people actually pay you to do it.

skills.grantedNote: The Music or Perform skill (from the interpersonal skill group), plus two more skills from the interpersonal group

politician.name: Politician
politician.description: You worked as a leader within a formal, bureaucratic organization or government.

sage.name: Sage
sage.description: From an early age, you dedicated yourself to learning, whether you shared the knowledge of the world with others or sought out secret lore only for yourself.

sailor.name: Sailor
sailor.description: You worked on a ship, whether a merchant cog, a mercenary or military craft, or a pirate vessel.

soldier.name: Soldier
soldier.description: In your formative years, you fought tirelessly in skirmishes and campaigns against enemy forces.

warden.name: Warden
warden.description: You protected a wild region from those who sought to harm it, such as poachers and cultists bent on the destruction of the natural world.

watchOfficer.name: Watch Officer
watchOfficer.description: You served as an officer of the law for a local government.
